failed_gate: Factorio 0.16 exact-candidate retention fresh reload verdict
harness_error: Factorio fresh-reload did not load the expected MIR archive cleanly
engine_diagnostic: Parallel sprite loading Failed: Failed to load sprite: loading bitmap failed: OutOfMemory. Falling back to normal sprite loading.
root_cause: The retention harness treated every line containing Error as fatal even when Factorio recovered through normal sprite loading, loaded the candidate and save, completed the benchmark, and exited successfully.
fix: Require successful process exit, exact MIR load, save creation or benchmarked map-load proof, and absence of fatal mod-load or stack errors; do not classify the recoverable ParallelSpriteLoader fallback as a failed candidate.
regression: Test-MIRPowerShellQuality rejects the former generic Error-line verdict.
